LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_HE.label: 32-pounder cannon explosive round
LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_HE.description: A round shell designed to be fired from a cannon.
LanguageData.Bullet_164mmCannonShell_HE.label: 32-pounder cannon shell (HE)

LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_AP.description: A round shell designed to be fired from a cannon.

LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_FI.label: 32-pounder cannon incendiary round (Incendiary)
LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_FI.description: A round shell designed to be fired from a cannon.
LanguageData.Bullet_164mmCannonShell_FI.label: 32-pounder incendiary shell
LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_HEChamber.label: 18-pounder cannon chamber explosive round
LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_HEChamber.descript: A metal projectile and powder charge loaded in a mug-shaped chamber to be loaded into a cannon.
LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_APChamber.label: 18-pounder cannon chamber solid round
LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_APChamber.descript: A metal projectile and powder charge loaded in a mug-shaped chamber to be loaded into a cannon.
LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_FIChamber.label: 18-pounder cannon chamber incendiary round
LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_FIChamber.descript: A metal projectile and powder charge loaded in a mug-shaped chamber to be loaded into a cannon.
LanguageData.Bullet_164mmCannonShell_HE_Mortar.label: 24-pounder cannon shell (HE)
LanguageData.Bullet_164mmCannonShell_AP_Mortar.label: 24-pounder cannon solid round
LanguageData.Bullet_164mmCannonShell_FI_Mortar.label: 24-pounder incendiary shell
LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_GunStoneSmall.desc: A round shell designed to be fired from a cannon.
LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_GunStone.label: 24-pounder cannon gunstone
LanguageData.Ammo_164mmCannonShell_GunStone.descripti: A round shell designed to be fired from a cannon.
LanguageData.Bullet_164mmCannonShell_GunStone.label: 24-pounder cannon gunstone
LanguageData.Ammo_DragonatorSpike.label: Dragonator Spike
